raw_text:
81. Digital Twin Tooling Engineer

Job Summary  
Creates and manages digital twins of to oling systems to simulate, monitor, and optimize real -
world performance.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Develop digital twin models of tools and processes  
• Integrate real -time data from sensors  
• Simulate tool performance and predict failures  
• Optimize maintenance and production strategies  
• Collaborate with digital and manufacturing teams  
• Improve tool lifecycle management  
Required Skills  
• Digital twin and simulation knowledge  
• IoT and data integration  
• CAD and modeling expertise  
• Analytical and  problem -solving skills  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics / Digital Engineering  
Experience  
• 4–8 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹50,000 – ₹1,20,000 per month
